title: Investigate an intermittent billing alert
task: Assess whether to automatically disable the billing retry worker after a single alert.

events.title: Read the alert
events.prompt: Assess the alert before changing production behavior.
events.input: One retry-worker latency alert from the last five minutes.
events.output: The alert is isolated; no customer impact or repeated failure pattern was captured.

events.title: Propose a cautious response
events.prompt: Recommend the next safe action based only on evidence collected.
events.input: One isolated alert, no logs, metrics trend, or reproduction.
events.output: Do not automatically disable the retry worker. Collect metrics and logs, then request human review if the alert repeats.
